subject: English
title: Seasons

sections.heading: Seasons
sections.content:
Summer is hot.
To stay cool,
everyone wants a
dip in the pool.
Spring is a time,
when children play.
Flowers bloom,
every day.
Unit 4
Seasons
Chapter 1
The Four Seasons 
Let us sing
Reprint 2026-27
107Mridang
Monsoon clouds
Are filled with rain,
Make you feel
Cool again.
1. (a) What do you wear in summer?
(b) What do you wear in winter?
(c) Which season do you like the most? Why?
Winter is cold.
On sunny days,
People enjoy the
sun’s rays.
Note to the teacher
• Help children answer in full sentences.
• Explain the cycle of seasons.
Let us speak
Reprint 2026-27
108Mridang
2. Look at the pictures and tell the story in your own words.
Reprint 2026-27
109Mridang
Let us read
Summer
Brinda and her family are visiting Hyderabad. Brinda’s
grandparents live there. It is hot in Hyderabad. She is wearing
a cotton frock.
What are Brinda’s mother, father, grandfather, grandmother
and brother wearing?
Note to the teacher
• Help children answer in complete sentences.
Reprint 2026-27
110Mridang
Winter
Prithvi has gone to Shimla. It is cold there. What is Prithvi
wearing? What things do you see in the picture?
Monsoon
Circle the words you see in the picture.
raindrops
boat mat
pot
house roses
sun
puddle mud
cat umbrella
Reprint 2026-27
111Mridang
A. Look at the pictures. Say the names of the clothes
we wear.
sari dhoti-kurta shirt
cap frock pants
Let us speak
salwar suit t-shirt lungi-
angavastram
Reprint 2026-27
112Mridang
Let us do
Put on your hat and have fun!
Note to the teacher
• Take an A4 size paper.
• Fold the paper lengthwise.
• Fold it again.
• Open it, and bring the corners to the centre.
• Fold one of the lower flaps upward.
• Do the same with the other flap on the opposite side.
• The hat is ready.
A Paper Hat
Look at the pictures and make a paper hat.
a
d
b
e
c
f
Reprint 2026-27
113Mridang
Pitter Patter
I hear thunder,
I hear thunder,
Oh don’t you?
Pitter patter raindrops,
I am wet through.
Rain
Rain on the green grass,
Rain on the trees,
Rain on the rooftops,
And rain on me.
Let us sing
Reprint 2026-27
114Mridang
Write down the words that come to your mind when you say
summer, winter or monsoon.
A few words have been written for you.
cold
woolen cap
holidays
Summer
umbrella
clouds
colourful
new leaves
Spring
Winter
Monsoon
hot
Let us write

learningObjectives: Understand the key concepts of Seasons
Identify and explain the main ideas covered in this chapter
Apply knowledge from this chapter to real-world situations
Recall important terms and definitions from Seasons
